law_title_en: Bylaw on Transactions of the Export Guarantee Fund of Iran
law_title_fa: آيين نامه معاملات صندوق ضمانت صادرات ايران
current_justification_en: Governs transactions of the Export Guarantee Fund of Iran, the state export-credit insurer whose guarantees are meant to de-risk exporting and expand merchandise export volumes.

law_title_en: Bylaw No. 59 of the High Council of Insurance on Liability Insurance for Officials and Executors of Transfer (Divestiture) Operations
law_title_fa: آئين نامه شماره 59  شوراي عالي بيمه در خ ... ه  مسئوليت مسئولان و مجريان امر واگذاري
targets_named_charts: Market capitalization of listed domestic companies (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: A 2009 insurance-council bylaw defining liability of officials and agents who execute state asset-divestiture (privatization) transactions, part of the legal scaffolding around Article 44 privatizations that fed shares onto the Tehran Stock Exchange.

law_title_en: Bylaw No. 83 Regarding Commissions for Insurance Agency and Official Insurance Brokerage
law_title_fa: آئين نامه شماره 83 درخصوص كارمزد نمايندگي و دلالي رسمي بيمه
current_justification_en: This 2013 bylaw set commission rates paid to official insurance agents and brokers, a regulated-price instrument that directly shapes the incentives and size of the insurance sales network shown in this chart.

law_title_en: Bylaw on Housing Provision for Persons with Disabilities
law_title_fa: آيين نامه تأمين مسكن معلولين
targets_named_charts: Coverage of social protection and labor programs (% of population)
Coverage of social safety net programs (% of population)
current_justification_en: A 2010 bylaw establishing housing provision for disabled persons, a targeted social-protection benefit that would add to the coverage of Iran's social protection and safety-net programs.

law_title_en: Act Approving the Agreement on Reciprocal Promotion and Protection of Investment between the Government of the Islamic Republic of Iran and the Government of Qatar
law_title_fa: قانون موافقتنامه تشويق و حمايت متقابل از ...  بين دولت جمهوري اسلامي ايران و دولت قطر
targets_named_charts: Foreign direct investment, net inflows (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: This 2001 reciprocal investment promotion and protection agreement with Qatar was designed to reassure investors and lift bilateral capital flows, a direct instrument targeting Iran's net FDI inflows.

law_title_en: Act Approving the Agreement on Reciprocal Promotion and Protection of Investment between the Government of the Islamic Republic of Iran and the Government of the Republic of Tunisia
law_title_fa: قانون موافقتنامه تشويق و حمايت متقابل از ... ت جمهوري اسلامي ايران و دولت جمهوري تونس
targets_named_charts: Foreign direct investment, net inflows (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: This 2003 reciprocal investment promotion and protection agreement with Tunisia aimed to reassure investors and expand bilateral capital flows, a direct instrument targeting Iran's net FDI inflows.

law_title_en: Act of the Agreement between the Islamic Republic of Iran and the Republic of Armenia for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with Respect to Taxes on Income and Capital
law_title_fa: قانون موافقتنامه اجتناب ازاخذ ماليات مضا ... مهوري اسلامي ايران ودولت جمهوري ارمنستان
targets_named_charts: Taxes on income, profits and capital gains
current_justification_en: This 1997 double-taxation avoidance agreement with Armenia removes duplicate tax liability on cross-border income, an instrument meant to encourage bilateral investment and affecting how income and capital-gains tax revenue is collected from cross-border activity.

law_title_en: Act on the ECO Trade Cooperation Agreement
law_title_fa: قانون  موافقتنامه  همكاريهاي  تجاري  اكو
current_justification_en: The 2000 ECO Trade Cooperation Agreement is a regional trade-liberalization instrument among Economic Cooperation Organization members, intended to lower barriers and expand Iran's merchandise trade with regional partners.

law_title_en: Act on the Trade Agreement between the Government of the Islamic Republic of Iran and the Government of the Republic of Turkey
law_title_fa: قانون  موافقتنامه  بازرگاني  بين  دولت  جمهوري  اسلامي  ايران  و دولت جمهوري  تركيه
current_justification_en: This 2001 bilateral trade agreement with Turkey set tariff and trade terms between the two countries, intended to expand merchandise trade flows.

law_title_en: Act on the Trade Agreement between the Government of the Islamic Republic of Iran and the Government of the Syrian Arab Republic
law_title_fa: قانون موافقتنامه بازرگاني بين دولت جمهوري اسلامي ايران و دولت جمهوري عربي سوريه
current_justification_en: This 2001 bilateral trade agreement with Syria set tariff and trade terms between the two countries, intended to expand merchandise trade flows.

law_title_en: Act on the Agreement between the Government of the Islamic Republic of Iran and ... on the Prevention, Investigation, and Combating of Customs Offenses
law_title_fa: قانون موافقتنامه بين دولت جمهوري اسلامي  ... جلوگيري ، تحقيق و مبارزه با تخلفات گمركي
current_justification_en: This 2006 customs-enforcement cooperation agreement with a partner country targets customs violations such as smuggling and misdeclaration, a compliance instrument meant to protect legitimate merchandise trade flows.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 1029 of the General Board of the Administrative Justice Court Annulling Resolution No. 23 of 31/1/1393 (April 20, 2014) of the Masjed Soleyman Islamic City Council Regarding the Imposition of Charges on Oil and Gas Wells
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 1029 هيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت اداري با موضوع ابطال مصوبه شماره 23 - 31 /1 /1393 شوراي اسلامي مسجد سليمان در خصوص
current_justification_en: This 2018 court ruling annulled a municipal levy imposed on oil and gas wells, removing a local tax burden on oil-sector operators and marginally easing production costs.

law_title_en: Land Reform Act (1962)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: The 1963 Land Reform Law was the centerpiece of the Shah's White Revolution, redistributing agricultural land from large landowners to peasant cultivators and reshaping Iran's growth path through the 1960s-70s; any serious account of Iran's GDP over this period must mention it.

law_title_en: Land Reform Act (1962)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: As the direct instrument that redistributed farmland tenure and abolished the landlord-sharecropper system, this law is the primary legal cause of Iran's mid-20th-century shift in agricultural land structure and cropping incentives.

law_title_en: Land Reform Act (1962)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: By transferring land ownership from a small landlord class to millions of peasant cultivators, the reform was a major redistributive shock to rural income and wealth distribution.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for 1335
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1335 كل كشور
current_justification_en: As Iran's annual national budget law for FY1335 (1956), this statute set the government's spending and revenue framework for that fiscal year, a national-scale fiscal instrument that any account of the period's GDP path must situate within.

law_title_en: National Budget Act for 1335
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1335 كل كشور
current_justification_en: This is the direct legal instrument that set government expenditure and revenue for FY1335, the most direct possible link to any government-finance measure of that year.

law_title_en: National Budget Law for the Year 1303 (1924/25)
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه مملكتي سنه 1303 شمسي
current_justification_en: As Iran's annual national budget law for 1303 (1925), enacted at the start of the Pahlavi era's state-building and modernization drive, this statute set the government's spending and revenue framework, a national-scale fiscal instrument foundational to the country's modern economic trajectory.

law_title_en: National Budget Law for the Year 1303 (1924/25)
law_title_fa: قانون بودجه مملكتي سنه 1303 شمسي
current_justification_en: This is the direct legal instrument that set government expenditure and revenue for the 1303 fiscal year, at the founding of the modern Iranian budgetary state.

law_title_en: Regulations for Granting Facilities to Facilitate and Expedite the Completion of Housing Projects and Their Allocation to Mehr Housing Applicants
law_title_fa: ضوابط اعطاي تسهيلات به منظور تسهيل و تسر ... ن مسكن و تخصيص آنها به متقاضيان مسكن مهر
targets_named_charts: Gross fixed capital formation (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: This 2010 bylaw set the bank-credit terms and unit-allocation rules for the Mehr Housing programme, a mass state-directed residential construction drive that added roughly two million housing units nationwide during the early 2010s, materially expanding the residential construction activity captured in gross fixed capital formation.

law_title_en: Regulations for Granting Facilities to Facilitate and Expedite the Completion of Housing Projects and Their Allocation to Mehr Housing Applicants
law_title_fa: ضوابط اعطاي تسهيلات به منظور تسهيل و تسر ... ن مسكن و تخصيص آنها به متقاضيان مسكن مهر
current_justification_en: The Mehr programme delivered housing credit at subsidized, below-market interest rates through state banks, functioning as an implicit fiscal transfer to households and builders.

law_title_en: Bylaw on Facilities for, and the Manner of, Converting Non-Governmental Electricity Producers' Revenue into Foreign Currency
law_title_fa: آيين نامه  تسهيلات  و نحوه  تبديل  درآمد توليدكنندگان  غيردولتي برق  به  ارز
targets_named_charts: Investment in energy with private participation
Public private partnerships investment in energy
current_justification_en: This 2002 mechanism let independent (private) power producers convert their rial revenue into foreign currency at guaranteed terms, directly addressing the FX-risk barrier that had been a main deterrent to private investment in Iran's power-generation capacity.

law_title_en: Bylaw on Facilities for, and the Manner of, Converting Non-Governmental Electricity Producers' Revenue into Foreign Currency
law_title_fa: آيين نامه  تسهيلات  و نحوه  تبديل  درآمد توليدكنندگان  غيردولتي برق  به  ارز
current_justification_en: As an FX-allocation mechanism specific to one sector, it forms part of the broader patchwork of preferential and multiple exchange-rate arrangements reflected in the gap between official and parallel-market rates.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Issuance of 150 Billion Rials in Participation Bonds ... within 15 Months from the Date of Approval of this Bylaw
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي انتشار يكصد و پنجاه ميل ... ظرف 1 5 ماه از تاريخ تصويب اين آيين نامه
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: This 1999 bylaw implemented a discrete 150-billion-rial government bond issuance, one of many ad hoc domestic borrowing instruments feeding into Iran's stock of government debt during the period.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Note under Clause 2 of Article 38 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاحيه تبصره بند 2 ماده 38 آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1999 amendment altered the executive bylaw governing Iran's foreign-trade licensing and procedural regime, the framework through which most merchandise trade flows are administered.

law_title_en: Approval of Article 50 Bis of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: تصويب ماده 50 مكرر آئين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1989 addition to the executive bylaw of the Export/Import Regulations Law came amid Iran's post-war reconstruction opening of trade policy, shaping the procedural framework for the trade flows recorded in these series.

law_title_en: Addition of Clause 3 Bis to Article 11 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: الحاق بند  3  مكرر به ماده  11  آيين نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 2015 clause made a narrow procedural addition to the executive bylaw of the Export/Import Regulations Law, part of the ongoing fine-tuning of Iran's trade-licensing framework.

law_title_en: New Regulation on Income Tax
law_title_fa: نظامنامه جديد ماليات بر عايدات
targets_named_charts: Taxes on income, profits and capital gains
current_justification_en: This 1934 regulation established one of Iran's earliest direct taxes on capital gains and income, part of Reza Shah-era state-building that laid the legal foundation for the income and capital-gains taxation reflected in modern tax-revenue statistics.

law_title_en: Amendment to Article (7) of the Bylaw on Technical Standards for Automobile Imports
law_title_fa: اصلاح ماده (۷) آیین‌نامه ضوابط فنی واردات خودرو
targets_named_charts: National Motor Vehicle Production (incl. Paykan/Iran Khodro Milestones)
current_justification_en: This 2017 amendment to automobile-import technical regulations altered the terms under which foreign vehicles could enter the Iranian market, a channel that affects the competitive pressure on, and import-content of, domestic vehicle production.

law_title_en: Ministry of Energy Circular on Electricity Tariffs and Their General Conditions
law_title_fa: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
current_justification_en: This 2025 Ministry of Energy circular directly sets regulated electricity tariffs and general conditions of service, a core administered price that feeds directly into the housing/utilities component of the consumer price index and into industrial input costs captured in the wholesale price index.

law_title_en: Ministry of Energy Circular on Electricity Tariffs and Their General Conditions
law_title_fa: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
current_justification_en: Higher regulated electricity tariffs create a price incentive that can dampen growth in per-capita electricity consumption over time.

law_title_en: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
law_title_fa: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
current_justification_en: This is a companion/duplicate 2025 circular on electricity tariffs and terms of service, directly setting a core administered price that feeds into the housing/utilities component of the consumer price index and into industrial input costs in the wholesale price index.

law_title_en: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
law_title_fa: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
current_justification_en: Higher regulated electricity tariffs create a price incentive that can dampen growth in per-capita electricity consumption over time.

law_title_en: Central Bank Circular on Transmitting the Third List of Import Orders for Medical Equipment and Supplies Exempt from the Foreign-Exchange Rate Differential Owed to the Ministry of Health, Treatment and Medical Education
law_title_fa: بخشنامه بانك مركزي درخصوص ارسال فهرست سوم ثبت سفارش هاي تجهيزات و ملزومات پزشكي بدون تغيير گروه كالايي و معاف از پرداخت
current_justification_en: This 2025 Central Bank circular operationalizes the transmission of price-differential (subsidy settlement) funds tied to the Ministry of Health, part of the government transfer and subsidy payments captured in this series.

law_title_en: Central Bank Circular on Transmitting the Third List of Import Orders for Medical Equipment and Supplies Exempt from the Foreign-Exchange Rate Differential Owed to the Ministry of Health, Treatment and Medical Education
law_title_fa: بخشنامه بانك مركزي درخصوص ارسال فهرست سوم ثبت سفارش هاي تجهيزات و ملزومات پزشكي بدون تغيير گروه كالايي و معاف از پرداخت
targets_named_charts: Domestic general government health expenditure (% of current health expenditure)
current_justification_en: Since the mechanism channels subsidy settlements specifically tied to the Ministry of Health, it forms part of the domestic government funding stream behind current health expenditure.

law_title_en: بخشنامه بانك مركزي درخصوص ارسال فهرست سوم ثبت سفارش هاي تجهيزات و ملزومات پزشكي بدون تغيير
law_title_fa: بخشنامه بانك مركزي درخصوص ارسال فهرست سوم ثبت سفارش هاي تجهيزات و ملزومات پزشكي بدون تغيير گروه كالايي و معاف از پرداخت
current_justification_en: This is a duplicate of the Central Bank circular on price-differential settlements tied to the Ministry of Health, operationalizing government transfer and subsidy payments captured in this series.

law_title_en: بخشنامه بانك مركزي درخصوص ارسال فهرست سوم ثبت سفارش هاي تجهيزات و ملزومات پزشكي بدون تغيير
law_title_fa: بخشنامه بانك مركزي درخصوص ارسال فهرست سوم ثبت سفارش هاي تجهيزات و ملزومات پزشكي بدون تغيير گروه كالايي و معاف از پرداخت
targets_named_charts: Domestic general government health expenditure (% of current health expenditure)
current_justification_en: Since the mechanism channels subsidy settlements specifically tied to the Ministry of Health, it forms part of the domestic government funding stream behind current health expenditure.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Manner of Utilizing the Credit under Clause 1 of Note 12 of the Budget Law for the Year 1368 (1989/90), Regarding Revenue Line 390400 from the Implementation of the Mines Act, as Amended
law_title_fa: آئین نامه اجرائی نحوه مصرف اعتبار بند ۱ تبصره ۱۲ قانون بودجه سال ۶۸ موضوع ردیف ۳۹۰۴۰۰ درآمدحاصل از اجرای قانون معادن با
current_justification_en: This 1989 executive bylaw earmarked a specific budget row for spending revenue collected under the Mining Law, a narrow allocation within the annual budget law totals.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Organization and Duties of the Cotton Executive Committee
law_title_fa: آيين نامه تشكيلات و وظايف كميته اجرائي پنبه
current_justification_en: This 1955 regulation established the executive structure of Iran's Cotton Committee, a body that historically could influence cotton procurement and pricing arrangements, though FAOSTAT price series for this period are thin and largely modeled.

law_title_en: Bylaw on the Organization and Duties of the Cotton Executive Committee
law_title_fa: آيين نامه تشكيلات و وظايف كميته اجرائي پنبه
current_justification_en: A procurement and pricing committee can also affect planting incentives and thus cotton output over time.

law_title_en: Land Reform Act (1960)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: The 1960/1962 Land Reform Law was the centerpiece of the Shah's White Revolution, abolishing large absentee landlordism and redistributing cultivated land to millions of peasant farmers; it reshaped Iran's growth path through the 1960s-70s and any serious account of national output over this period must mention it.

law_title_en: Land Reform Act (1960)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: The law is the explicit instrument that restructured land tenure and cultivation incentives across Iranian agriculture, directly targeting the domain these charts cover.

law_title_en: Land Reform Act (1960)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: By breaking up large landed estates and transferring ownership to smallholders, the law reduced the concentration of rural wealth held by a small landlord class, a structural shift relevant to Iran's long-run inequality trajectory.

law_title_en: Land Reform Act (1960)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاحات ارضي
targets_named_charts: Employment in agriculture (% of total employment) (modeled ILO estimate)
current_justification_en: The reform reorganized the agrarian labor structure by converting many tenant farmers and sharecroppers into landholders or wage laborers on agribusiness estates, feeding into the long-run decline of agriculture's employment share.

law_title_en: Securities Market Act
law_title_fa: قانون بازار اوراق بهادار جمهوري اسلامي ايران
current_justification_en: The 2005 Securities Market Law is the foundational legal instrument that created the modern regulatory framework for Iran's stock market (establishing the Securities and Exchange Organization), directly targeting exactly this measure's domain.

law_title_en: Anti-Money Laundering Act
law_title_fa: قانون مبارزه با پولشويي
current_justification_en: The 2008 Anti-Money Laundering Law created Iran's formal AML/CFT legal framework, a real channel affecting international perceptions of regulatory quality and corruption control, both of which also interact with Iran's sanctions and FATF listing history.

law_title_en: Anti-Money Laundering Act
law_title_fa: قانون مبارزه با پولشويي
current_justification_en: AML/CFT compliance status is one factor foreign counterparties weigh when assessing whether to invest in Iran, giving the law a plausible but minor channel to net FDI inflows.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Exchange and Implementation of Three Oil Contracts
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه  مبادله و اجراي  سه فقره قرارداد نفت
current_justification_en: This 1971 law ratified Iran's renegotiated oil agreements with the international consortium, directly restructuring the terms under which Iranian crude was produced and revenue was shared, the explicit instrument behind Iran's oil output and oil-rent trajectory in the 1970s.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Exchange and Implementation of Three Oil Contracts
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه  مبادله و اجراي  سه فقره قرارداد نفت
current_justification_en: Oil was Iran's dominant revenue source in the 1970s, so a law reshaping the terms of oil production and revenue-sharing is a national-scale instrument any serious account of GDP in this period must reference.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Exchange and Implementation of Three Oil Contracts
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه  مبادله و اجراي  سه فقره قرارداد نفت
current_justification_en: By governing the volume and terms of Iranian crude sold through the consortium, the law had a real channel into the fuel share of Iran's merchandise exports.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 64 of the General Board of the Administrative Court of Justice Voiding Clause 6 of the Economic Council's Resolution of 1999/03/12 and the Related Decision Stated in Letter No. 1769/34 of the Plan and Budget Organization, Concerning the Reduction of the Vegetable Oil Purchase Price
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 64 هيئت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادار ... بودجه در خصوص تقليل نرخ خريد رو غن نباتي
current_justification_en: This 2001 Administrative Court of Justice ruling directly struck down a budget-law provision reducing the guaranteed purchase price of vegetable oil, an explicit price-control instrument targeting exactly this measure.

law_title_en: Directive and Implementation Procedure for the Bylaw on Collection of Duties in Free Trade-Industrial Zones
law_title_fa: دستورالعمل و روش اجرائي آئين نامه اخذ عوارض در مناطق آزاد تجاري ـ صنعتي
current_justification_en: This 1994 instruction sets the procedure for levying customs duties in Iran's free trade zones, a direct channel into the customs and import-duty revenue collected nationally.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act (1987)
law_title_fa: آئيننامه اجرائي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1987 executive bylaw implements Iran's core Export-Import Regulations Law, the operational rulebook governing licensing and procedures for most of Iran's foreign trade during the war-economy and early post-war years.

law_title_en: Act on the Purchase of Agricultural Land for Industrial and Mining Needs
law_title_fa: قانون خريد اراضي كشاورزي براي تأمين نيازمنديهاي صنعتي و معدني
current_justification_en: This 1969 law authorized compulsory purchase of agricultural land for industrial and mining projects, a direct instrument reallocating land use away from farming.

law_title_en: Act on the Purchase of Agricultural Land for Industrial and Mining Needs
law_title_fa: قانون خريد اراضي كشاورزي براي تأمين نيازمنديهاي صنعتي و معدني
current_justification_en: The land acquired under this law was earmarked for industrial and mining sites, giving it an indirect channel into industrial value added.

law_title_en: Act on Support for Domestic Livestock Production
law_title_fa: قانون حمايت از توليد دام داخلي
targets_named_charts: Beef and Buffalo Meat, primary, Production
current_justification_en: The 1990 Law on Supporting Domestic Livestock Production is an explicit instrument aimed at boosting domestic livestock output through protective and support measures, directly targeting these production series.

law_title_en: Act on Accelerating the Electrification of Agricultural Well Pumps
law_title_fa: قانون  تسريع  در برقي  كردن  موتور چاههاي  كشاورزي
targets_named_charts: Agricultural irrigated land (% of total agricultural land)
current_justification_en: This 1999 law accelerated the conversion of agricultural water-well motors from diesel to electric power, a direct instrument affecting the reliability and extent of irrigation infrastructure.

law_title_en: Act on Accelerating the Electrification of Agricultural Well Pumps
law_title_fa: قانون  تسريع  در برقي  كردن  موتور چاههاي  كشاورزي
targets_named_charts: Access to electricity, rural (% of rural population)
current_justification_en: Electrifying agricultural well motors required extending the rural electricity grid, giving the law a real channel into rural electricity access.

law_title_en: Urban Renewal and Development Act
law_title_fa: قانون نوسازي و عمران شهري
targets_named_charts: Housing Units by Number of Resident Households, Census Years (1966-2006)
current_justification_en: The 1968 Urban Renewal and Development Law established Iran's national framework for urban redevelopment and municipal housing/infrastructure projects, a policy of national scope directly bearing on the growth of the housing stock captured in this census series.

law_title_en: Act on the Establishment of the Iran Industrial Estates Company
law_title_fa: قانون راجع به تأسيس شركت شهركهاي صنعتي ايران
targets_named_charts: Industry (including construction), value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: This 1984 law established the Iran Industrial Estates Company, the national institution responsible for developing serviced industrial-park land across the country, a direct institution-building instrument for industrial output.

law_title_en: Act on the Establishment of the Iran Industrial Estates Company
law_title_fa: قانون راجع به تأسيس شركت شهركهاي صنعتي ايران
targets_named_charts: Industrial Production Value Share by Province
Industrial Workshop Count Share by Province
current_justification_en: Industrial estates are the physical siting mechanism for provincial industrial workshops and output, giving the founding law a direct if diffuse channel into these provincial distribution charts decades later.

law_title_en: Bill Having the Force of Law on the Administration and Ownership of Shares of Contracting and Consulting Engineering Companies and Institutions
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني اداره و تملك سهام شركتها و مؤسسات پيمانكاري و مهندسي مشاور
current_justification_en: This 1980 decree placed the shares of large private contracting and consulting-engineering firms under state administration, part of the broader post-revolutionary nationalization wave that any serious account of Iran's early-1980s GDP path must mention.

law_title_en: Bill Having the Force of Law on the Administration and Ownership of Shares of Contracting and Consulting Engineering Companies and Institutions
law_title_fa: لايحه قانوني اداره و تملك سهام شركتها و مؤسسات پيمانكاري و مهندسي مشاور
targets_named_charts: Industry (including construction), value added (% of GDP)
current_justification_en: Contracting and engineering-consulting firms fall within the construction/industry sector, so their state takeover has a real, if diffuse, channel into this sector's value added.

law_title_en: Act on the Transfer of Lands Allotted to Farmers Subject to the Land Reform Laws and Regulations
law_title_fa: قانون نحوه انتقال اراضي واگذاري بزارعين مشمول قوانين ومقررات اصلاحات ارضي
current_justification_en: This 1972 law governs how land transferred to farmers under the earlier Land Reform program could subsequently be transferred, an implementing follow-on to the 1960 reform that continued to shape land tenure and cultivation across Iranian agriculture.

law_title_en: Act on the Dissolution of the Crown Lands Organization (Bongah-e Khalisejat)
law_title_fa: قانون انحلال بنگاه خالصجات
current_justification_en: The 1967 law dissolving the Khalesejat (crown/state lands) agency transferred large state-held agricultural landholdings into private or cooperative hands, complementing the broader Land Reform program's restructuring of Iranian land tenure.

law_title_en: Act on the Establishment of the Supreme Employment Council
law_title_fa: قانون تشکیل شورایعالی اشتغال با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی
targets_named_charts: Unemployment, total (% of total labor force) (modeled ILO estimate)
Unemployment, total (% of total labor force) (national estimate)
Employment to population ratio, 15+, total (%) (modeled ILO estimate)
current_justification_en: This 1998 law created the Supreme Employment Council, the top national body tasked with coordinating employment policy across ministries, an instrument whose explicit purpose is to influence exactly these labor-market outcomes.

law_title_en: Social Insurance Act for Construction Workers
law_title_fa: قانون بيمه هاي اجتماعي كارگران ساختماني
targets_named_charts: Coverage of social protection and labor programs (% of population)
current_justification_en: The 2007 Social Insurance Law for Construction Workers is an explicit instrument extending mandatory social-insurance coverage to a large previously under-covered occupational segment, directly targeting social-protection coverage.

law_title_en: Social Insurance Act for Construction Workers
law_title_fa: قانون بيمه هاي اجتماعي كارگران ساختماني
targets_named_charts: Employment in industry (% of total employment) (modeled ILO estimate)
current_justification_en: Construction workers are counted within the industry employment category, so formalizing their insurance status has an indirect channel into recorded industry employment patterns.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح آيين  نامه اجرايي قانون مقررات صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1998 amendment to the executive bylaw of Iran's Export/Import Regulations Law reset the annual list of permitted, conditional and prohibited goods and the licensing procedures traders had to follow, directly shaping the volume and composition of import and export flows.

law_title_en: Amendment to the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Regulations Act
law_title_fa: اصلاح  آئين  نامه اجرائي  قانون  مقررات  صادرات  و واردات
current_justification_en: This 1991 amendment to the executive bylaw of the Export/Import Regulations Law updated the goods-classification and licensing regime governing which items could be freely traded, conditionally traded, or banned, directly bearing on import and export volumes.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Issuance of 100 Billion Rials in Participation Bonds under Clause (D) of Note 48 of the General Budget Law for the Year 1378 (1999/2000)
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي انتشار يكصد ميليارد ريا ... د د تبصره 48 قانون بودجه سال 1378كل كشور
targets_named_charts: Government Debt to the Central Bank
current_justification_en: This bylaw authorized issuance of 100 billion rials in government bonds under a clause of the 1378 (1999/2000) budget law, a direct instrument of deficit financing that adds to government debt and shows up in budget totals.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Manner of Selling Low-Cost Housing under Clause (D) of Note 13 of the General Budget Law for the Year 1368 (1989/90)
law_title_fa: آئيننامه اجرائي نحوه فروش خانه هاي ارزان ...  د تبصره  13  قانون بودجه سال 68 كل كشور
targets_named_charts: Housing Units by Number of Resident Households, Census Years (1966-2006)
current_justification_en: This bylaw implemented a subsidized/cheap-housing sales program under the 1368 (1989/90) budget, part of the postwar reconstruction-era push to expand housing access, a policy channel loosely connected to housing-stock and household-size statistics.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Manner of Selling Low-Cost Housing under Note 13 of the General Budget Law for the Year 1367 (1988/89)
law_title_fa: آئين نامه اجرائي نحوه فروش خانه هاي ارزا ...    تبصره 13 قانون بودجه سال 1367 كل كشور
targets_named_charts: Housing Units by Number of Resident Households, Census Years (1966-2006)
current_justification_en: This bylaw implemented a subsidized/cheap-housing sales program under the 1367 (1988/89) wartime budget, part of the state's effort to expand housing access during the final year of the Iran-Iraq War, a policy loosely connected to housing-stock statistics.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Clause 11 of Note 29 of the 1989 Budget Act on the Use of the Export Revolving Fund, with Subsequent Amendments
law_title_fa: آئین نامه اجرائی بند ۱۱ تبصره ۲۹ قانون بودجه سال ۱۳۶۸ موضوع استفاده از تنخواه‌گردان صادراتی با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی
current_justification_en: This bylaw established an export revolving fund (تنخواه‌گردان صادراتی), a working-capital finance instrument for exporters introduced in the early postwar reconstruction period to ease liquidity constraints on export activity.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Note 1, Clause (C) of the Act on the Implementation of the General Policies of Article 44 of the Constitution
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي تبصره   1   بند   ج   م ... سياستهاي كلي اصل چهل و چهارم قانون اساسي
current_justification_en: This bylaw implements a clause of the Article 44 privatization policy, the core legal instrument for transferring state-owned enterprises into private and public hands via the Tehran Stock Exchange; the wave of Article 44 listings and share transfers is the direct channel behind the growth in listed companies, market capitalization and trading volume from the mid-2000s onward.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Note 1, Clause (C) of the Act on the Implementation of the General Policies of Article 44 of the Constitution
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي تبصره   1   بند   ج   م ... سياستهاي كلي اصل چهل و چهارم قانون اساسي
current_justification_en: Article 44 privatization is one of the central national-scale structural reforms of the 2000s-2010s, alongside subsidy reform and sanctions, that any serious account of Iran's GDP path in this period must reference; efficiency gains (or losses, given implementation problems) from divestiture feed into aggregate output.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw on the Job Classification and Evaluation Plan for Workshops, under Note 1 of Article 49 of the Labor Law
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي طرح طبقه بندي و ارزيابي مشاغل كارگاهها موضوع تبصره يك ماده 49 قانون كار
current_justification_en: This bylaw set the job-classification and wage-evaluation methodology under Article 49 of the Labor Law, a mechanism directly governing how wages are set and graded across covered workplaces, bearing on labor-market wage and employment-structure statistics.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 232 of the General Board of the Administrative Court of Justice ... Article 6 of the Executive Bylaw of the Export and Import Act
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 232 هيئت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادا ... 6 آيين نامه اجرايي قانون صادرات و واردات
current_justification_en: This administrative-court ruling struck down a single clause of the executive bylaw governing import/export regulation, a narrow legal correction to the trade-licensing framework rather than a standalone policy change.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 34 dated 1380/02/09 (2001) of the General Board of the Administrative Court of Justice ... Clause 43-4 of the Supplementary Bylaw on Electricity Tariffs
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 34 مورخ 1380 02 09 هيئت عمومي  ... ند 43 ـ 4 آيين نامه تكميلي تعرفه هاي برق
current_justification_en: This administrative-court ruling addressed a clause of supplementary electricity tariff regulation, a narrow legal correction to the tariff-setting framework rather than a rate change itself.

law_title_en: Ruling No. 601 of the General Board of the Administrative Court of Justice ... Circular No. 33553 dated 1387/4/12 (2008) of the National Tax Administration
law_title_fa: رأي شماره 601 ھيأت عمومي ديوان عدالت ادا ... 33553 مورخ 1387 4 12 سازمان امور مالياتي
current_justification_en: This administrative-court ruling annulled a tax-administration circular, a narrow procedural correction within the tax code rather than a rate or base change, loosely touching aggregate tax-revenue statistics.

law_title_en: Customs Circular on Updating the Following Tariff Codes in the List of Goods Subject to Percentage-Based Clearance
law_title_fa: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص به روز رساني كد تعرفه هاي ذيل در فهرست كالاهاي مشمول ترخيص درصدي
current_justification_en: This 2025 customs circular updates the tariff-code list for goods cleared under the percentage-based clearance regime, a routine administrative refresh of import classification codes.

law_title_en: Customs Circular on Updating the Following Tariff Codes in the List of Goods Subject to Percentage-Based Clearance
law_title_fa: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص به روزرساني كد تعرفه هاي ذيل در فهرست كالاهاي مشمول ترخيص درصدي
current_justification_en: This 2025 customs circular updates the tariff-code list for goods cleared under the percentage-based clearance regime, a routine administrative refresh of import classification codes.

law_title_en: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص به روز رساني كد تعرفه هاي ذيل در فهرست كالاهاي مشمول ترخيص درصدي
law_title_fa: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص به روز رساني كد تعرفه هاي ذيل در فهرست كالاهاي مشمول ترخيص درصدي
current_justification_en: This 2025 customs circular updates the tariff-code list for goods cleared under the percentage-based clearance regime, a routine administrative refresh of import classification codes.

law_title_en: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص به روز رساني كد تعرفه هاي ذيل در فهرست كالاهاي مشمول ترخيص درصدي
law_title_fa: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص به روز رساني كد تعرفه هاي ذيل در فهرست كالاهاي مشمول ترخيص درصدي
current_justification_en: This 2025 customs circular updates the tariff-code list for goods cleared under the percentage-based clearance regime, a routine administrative refresh of import classification codes.

law_title_en: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص به روز رساني كد تعرفه هاي ذيل در فهرست كالاهاي مشمول ترخيص درصدي
law_title_fa: بخشنامه گمرك در خصوص به روز رساني كد تعرفه هاي ذيل در فهرست كالاهاي مشمول ترخيص درصدي
current_justification_en: This 2025 customs circular updates the tariff-code list for goods cleared under the percentage-based clearance regime, a routine administrative refresh of import classification codes.

law_title_en: بخشنامه بانك مركزي درخصوص ارسال فهرست سوم ثبت سفارش هاي تجهيزات و ملزومات پزشكي بدون تغيير
law_title_fa: بخشنامه بانك مركزي درخصوص ارسال فهرست سوم ثبت سفارش هاي تجهيزات و ملزومات پزشكي بدون تغيير گروه كالايي و معاف از پرداخت
current_justification_en: This central-bank circular sets the price-differential (subsidy) list for health-ministry pharmaceuticals, a mechanism that channels subsidy transfers into keeping drug prices below market cost and, in turn, keeps out-of-pocket health spending lower than it would otherwise be.

law_title_en: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
law_title_fa: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
current_justification_en: This Ministry of Energy circular sets electricity tariffs and general supply conditions for 2025, the direct administrative instrument determining household and industrial electricity prices, which in turn shapes consumption patterns tracked in energy statistics.

law_title_en: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
law_title_fa: بخشنامه وزارت نيرو در خصوص تعرفه هاي برق و شرايط عمومي آنها
current_justification_en: This Ministry of Energy circular sets electricity tariffs and general supply conditions for 2025, the direct administrative instrument determining household and industrial electricity prices, which in turn shapes consumption patterns tracked in energy statistics.

law_title_en: Act Amending Note (1) of Article (6) and Article (8) of the Act on the Manner of Transferring State-Owned Shares to Veterans and Workers, as Amended
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح تبصره (۱) ماده (۶) و ماده (۸) قانون نحوه واگذاری سهام دولتی و متعلق به دولت به ایثارگران و کارگران با اصلاحا
current_justification_en: This law amended the mechanism for transferring state-owned company shares to war veterans and workers, an early (pre-Article 44) privatization/share-distribution channel that fed into the population of listed and transferred state enterprises on the stock exchange.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 10 of the Targeted Subsidies Act
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمند كردن يارانه ها
current_justification_en: This bylaw governs disbursement of the cash transfers that are the central mechanism of Iran's 2010 Targeted Subsidies Law, directly shaping the subsidies-and-transfers line in government accounts.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 10 of the Targeted Subsidies Act
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمند كردن يارانه ها
targets_named_charts: Consumer Price Index by COICOP Group (1395=100, SH1390-1399)
current_justification_en: The subsidy reform this bylaw implements replaced price subsidies on energy and bread with cash transfers, triggering a sharp one-time jump in administered prices visible across COICOP expenditure groups from 1390 onward.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 10 of the Targeted Subsidies Act
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمند كردن يارانه ها
targets_named_charts: Coverage of social safety net programs (% of population)
Adequacy of social safety net programs (% of total welfare of beneficiary households)
current_justification_en: The universal cash-transfer program this bylaw operationalizes is Iran's largest social safety-net program by coverage, directly driving safety-net coverage and adequacy indicators.

law_title_en: Executive Bylaw of Article 10 of the Targeted Subsidies Act
law_title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي ماده  10  قانون هدفمند كردن يارانه ها
current_justification_en: As the operational core of the 2010 subsidy-reform program, a landmark national economic policy, this measure is inseparable from Iran's inflation and growth story of the early 2010s.

law_title_en: Act on Assistance for the Development of Exports of Certain Goods
law_title_fa: قانون كمك بتوسعه صدور بعضي از اقلام كالاهاي صادراتي
current_justification_en: This 1964 law provided state assistance to boost exports of specified goods, part of Iran's early export-promotion toolkit that fed into aggregate merchandise export values over subsequent decades.

law_title_en: Act Requiring the Government to Submit an Annual Import and Export Regulations Bill
law_title_fa: قانون مربوط به الزام دولت به دادن لايحه مقررات سالانه واردات و صادرات
current_justification_en: This 1983 law obliges the government to submit an annual foreign-trade regulation bill, which for four decades has been the legal vehicle setting Iran's yearly import/export lists, licensing and tariff regime, a recurring structural driver of trade volumes.

law_title_en: Act on the Exemption of Vegetable Oil from Customs Duty, with Subsequent Amendments
law_title_fa: لایحه قانونی معافیت حقوق گمرکی روغن نباتی با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی
current_justification_en: This law directly exempts vegetable oil, a staple import, from customs duty, an explicit instrument targeting the cost and volume of vegetable-oil trade.

law_title_en: Act on the Exemption of Vegetable Oil from Customs Duty, with Subsequent Amendments
law_title_fa: لایحه قانونی معافیت حقوق گمرکی روغن نباتی با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی
current_justification_en: By lowering the import cost of vegetable oil, a household staple, the exemption directly supports consumption levels.

law_title_en: Act on the Exemption of Vegetable Oil from Customs Duty, with Subsequent Amendments
law_title_fa: لایحه قانونی معافیت حقوق گمرکی روغن نباتی با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی
current_justification_en: The exemption removes a cost component from imported oil-equivalent products, a real channel to domestic oilcrop/oil prices even though it is one of several price determinants.

law_title_en: Act Authorizing the Collection of a 5 Percent Increase on the Cost of Standard Marks and a 0.5 Percent Fee on Export Goods, as Amended
law_title_fa: قانون اجازه دریافت پنج درصد افزایش بهای تمام‌شده علائم استاندارد و نیم درصد کارمزد کالاهای صادراتی با اصلاحات و الحاقات
current_justification_en: This 1966 law raises a standard-mark surcharge and adds a half-percent commission fee on export goods, a small cost-side instrument touching the general merchandise export series.

law_title_en: Act Amending the General Budget for the Year 1374 (1995/96)
law_title_fa: قانون اصلاح بودجه سال 1374 كل كشور
current_justification_en: This law directly amends the FY1374 (1995/96) national budget law, revising the very spending and revenue totals this chart tracks for that year.
